purpose: public smoke-test sample; not used for reported manuscript metrics

anonymization.target: kept to preserve five-class script behavior
anonymization.raw_action: replaced with a constant redacted token
anonymization.timestamps: replaced with synthetic sequential timestamps on 2026-01-01
anonymization.event_fields: mapped within each column to stable generic codes such as application_001
anonymization.rule: mapped to generic rule_context codes; raw policy names are not released
anonymization.row_identifiers: no source row id or original order identifier is released; sampled rows are shuffled before synthetic timestamps are assigned

release_boundary: This sample is suitable for schema inspection and smoke tests only. It does not reproduce the reported manuscript metrics.
